name: Lady Eveline Wraithmoor
description: Heiress to the Wraithmoor estate; allergic to chrysanthemums.

name: Inspector Cassius Brand
description: A retired detective who insists he came for the hors d'oeuvres.

name: Dr. Marisol Quint
description: The household physician ,  knows whose pills are whose.

name: Reverend Aldous Penn
description: A travelling preacher whose sermons keep mentioning the host.

name: Madame Octavia Sable
description: A medium claiming the victim consulted her last Tuesday.

name: Mr. Thaddeus Glover
description: The butler. Yes, really. Don't make it weird.

name: Beatrice Halloran
description: Cook, gossip, and the only one who saw the kitchen at midnight.

name: Captain Rhys Ardent
description: Old navy friend of the victim, recently returned from sea.

name: Vivienne Marchand
description: A perfumer; her scents linger in rooms she swears she never entered.

name: Professor Edmund Crowe
description: Lecturer in entomology. Carries a jar. Of something.

name: Sister Adelheid Voss
description: A novice nun on retreat ,  quieter than the wallpaper.

name: Colonel Percival Hask
description: Distinguished veteran whose pension does not match his shoes.

name: Ottilie Bramwell
description: A clockmaker. Knows exactly when the lights went out.

name: Mortimer Finch
description: Estate solicitor, holding three wills and one secret.

name: Constance Yew
description: The gardener. Knows what soil the rose bed has been disturbed with.

name: Silas Roe
description: A jazz pianist booked for the evening's entertainment.

name: Dame Genevieve Pell
description: Patroness of the arts and the victim's longtime rival.

name: Bartholomew Knox
description: A locksmith hired the morning of the party. Why?

name: Imogen Sarsfield
description: Photographer covering the soirée ,  every flash is alibi or evidence.

name: Felix Drummond
description: A childhood friend of the victim. Or so the cards say.
